title: The Straw Hats Break CP9’s Wall: Turning Point

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You're not very cute, are you?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I made your skin shiny and all...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: If being cute means not resisting,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
